subcodes.first_line: O Muhammad! Upon thee be My glory, My mercy and My loving-kindness. Verily, We have chosen thee and made thee a servant of Mine own Self, that thou mayest be among [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا محمد علیک بهائی و رحمتی و عنایتی انا اخترناک و جعلناک خادما لنفسی لتکون من
subcodes.subjects: @Manifestation of God speaking in the voice of Divinity, @personal instructions, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution
